name: LoanMax Title Loans
description_short: Maplewood, MN LoanMax Title Loans at 1694 White Bear Ave offers quick title and payday loans with same-day approvals.
description_long:
Located at 1694 White Bear Ave Suite 103 in Maplewood, MN, this LoanMax Title Loans branch serves the local community with accessible financial solutions. The standalone storefront is open Monday through Friday from 10 AM to 6 PM and Saturday from 9 AM to 2 PM, making it convenient for Maplewood residents to stop by during their regular hours.

This Maplewood location specializes in title loans and payday advances, designed to provide quick cash when you need it most. For questions about eligibility, rates, or to start your application, call +1 651-243-4480. The team here can walk you through the process and help determine which loan option best fits your situation.

If you're a Maplewood resident facing an unexpected expense or cash crunch, this location offers a faster alternative to traditional bank loans. Bring your vehicle title, valid ID, and proof of income—approval and funding can happen the same day. LoanMax focuses on quick, straightforward lending without the lengthy delays of conventional lenders.
address: 1694 White Bear Ave Ste 103, Maplewood, MN 55109

company_info.headquarters: 1694 White Bear Ave Ste 103, Maplewood, MN 55109

pros: 35+ years in operation — founded 1990, one of the longest-tenured title lenders in the US
Loans up to $10,000, higher ceiling than most payday or emergency cash lenders
Minimal requirements: vehicle, photo ID, and clear title — no credit check required
Four payment methods accepted: Cash, Check, Debit Card, and Western Union
Saturday hours (9AM–2PM) accommodate borrowers who cannot visit on weekdays
Licensed and regulated in multiple states with publicly posted rate schedules and license links
Multiple metro Detroit locations (Southgate, Taylor, Garden City, Detroit, Center Line) for local access
cons: Interest rates and APR are not disclosed on the location or homepage — borrowers must visit in-store or call to get cost details
Your vehicle is collateral — failure to repay can result in repossession
Company's own Nevada disclosure acknowledges this is not a long-term financial solution
Limited hours (closes 6PM weekdays, 2PM Saturday) compared to 24/7 online lenders
No indication of a grace period, rollover policy, or early payoff terms on the public website
best_for: Vehicle owners who need fast access to cash ($500–$10,000) and hold a clear, lien-free title
Borrowers with poor or no credit who cannot qualify for a personal loan or credit card
Michigan residents who prefer in-person service over online-only lenders
People facing a one-time short-term cash shortfall who can repay quickly to avoid prolonged interest
diagnosis: LoanMax is best for vehicle owners in Michigan who need $500–$10,000 quickly and cannot access cheaper credit options such as personal loans or credit union PALs. The main caveat is that the vehicle serves as collateral and can be repossessed on default, and the company does not publicly disclose APR or fee schedules for Michigan on their location pages — making true cost comparison impossible without contacting the store directly.
services: Car title loans (auto title loans) up to $10,000
Online loan application and registration portal
Multi-location network across metro Detroit, MI
State-licensed operations with posted regulatory disclosures
Vehicle equity evaluation for loan approval
meta_description: Maplewood, MN LoanMax Title Loans at 1694 White Bear Ave. Fast title loans & payday advances with same-day approval.
